message:
feat(core,render-term): add budget event tracing and precomputed layout rendering

Budget Tracing (fm-core):
- Add MermaidBudgetEvent struct for detailed per-operation event logging
  with stage, action (allocate/consume/rebalance), amount, and remaining
- Extend MermaidBudgetLedger with events vector for full audit trail
- Implement push_stage_event() and snapshot_remaining_total_ms() for
  tracking budget flow across parse/layout/render stages

Terminal Renderer (fm-render-term):
- Accept precomputed layout parameter in render functions to avoid
  redundant layout computation during terminal output
- Add render_term_with_layout_and_config() entry point

CLI Integration:
- Update terminal render calls to pass precomputed layout
- Add test verifying empty precomputed layout prevents rendering
  node/edge content

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
